steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The answer must accurately describe the Amur grape data from the graph, giving specific counts for opposite-side and same-side leaf pair orientation to support the claim that one orientation dominates.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "150 leaf pairs show opposite-side orientation, whereas approximately 60 pairs show same-side orientation.": Matches the graph values for Amur grape exactly. ✓
  • "150 leaf pairs show opposite-side orientation, whereas approximately 49 pairs show same-side orientation.": Misreads the same-side bar; the graph shows ~60, not 49. ✗
  • "150 leaf pairs show opposite-side orientation, whereas no pairs show same-side orientation.": The graph clearly shows ~60 same-side pairs; this is factually wrong. ✗
  • "60 leaf pairs show opposite-side orientation, whereas approximately 150 pairs show same-side orientation.": Same error as C. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
